mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate reduce corporate borrowing costs and compress equity discount rates, directly increasing S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and reduced consumer spending power, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in >60% of instances where unemployment rises by more than 0.5 percentage points over three months.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts indicates synchronized consumer and business demand growth, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict positive returns when retail sales and housing starts diverge, or Rank IC drops below 0.02 over rolling 5-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month decline in the industrial production index reflects weakening manufacturing output and supply-side contraction, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Positive 5-day returns occur in >55% of months following industrial production declines during late-cycle phases.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer price inflation erodes real corporate earnings and forces monetary tightening expectations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: S&P 500 delivers positive 20-day returns in >65% of months where CPI inflation exceeds 0.4% month-over-month.

mechanism_narrative: Rising total nonfarm payrolls combined with a falling unemployment rate confirms robust labor market tightening and wage growth, supporting positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The combined labor signal yields negative forward returns in >50% of observation windows or shows no statistical significance in out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: Quarter-over-quarter growth in real gross domestic product reflects expanding aggregate demand and corporate revenue fundamentals, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns are negative in >55% of quarters following positive GDP growth, or the signal loses predictive power during financial stress periods.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production surpassing the 2017 baseline index level indicates sustained capacity utilization and manufacturing strength, triggering positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: The index threshold fails to predict positive 5-day returns in >60% of crossing events or Rank IC remains below 0.01 over rolling windows.
